name: Corn, Sausage and Bell Pepper Chowder
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons saute butter, Mrs. Bateman's Butterlike (tm)
1 red bell pepper, seeded and chopped
1/2 green bell pepper, seeded and chopped
1 pound red potatoes, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion, both bell peppers, and garlic; saute until the peppers are tender, about 15 minutes.
3. Add broth, potatoes, white pepper, and cumin. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer until the potatoes are tender, about 30 minutes.
5. Puree half of the corn in a food processor.
6. Add pureed corn, remaining corn, sausage, 1/3 cup milk, and cream to the chowder.
7. Simmer until flavors are blended, about 20 minutes.
8. Season the chowder to taste with salt and more white pepper, if desired.
9. Can be prepared up to one day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.
10. Rewarm over medium heat, stirring frequently and thinning with more milk if necessary.
